objective: Harden opencodex effort caps (devlog/260710_subagent_effort_intercept) with ladder-aware cap resolution: snap a cap absent from the target model's supported effort ladder DOWN to the highest supported rung at or below it (high->medium when ladder is low/medium/xhigh); use the lowest supported rung when all rungs are above the cap; strip reasoning entirely (call without effort) when the model exposes no effort control. Then expose both caps (effortCap, subagentEffortCap) in the Dashboard GUI (i18n en/ko/zh) and docs-site configuration reference (en/ko/zh-cn). Acceptance: bun test 0 fail incl. new snap/strip/lowest/undefined-ladder tests; tsc --noEmit exit 0; gui build exit 0; devlog updated with fresh evidence.

tasks.title: Resolve target model supported ladder (routed: configuredReasoningEfforts; native: catalog efforts)
resolveCappedEffort: snap cap down / lowest rung / strip semantics in effort-policy.ts
Strip path removes reasoning from BOTH request shapes
Tests: snap-down, strip-when-empty, lowest-when-all-above, undefined-ladder passthrough

workPhases.title: Expose caps: Dashboard GUI selectors + i18n + docs-site reference (en/ko/zh-cn)
